subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in the One, the All-Informed, and hath turned towards the Heart of the World and acknowledged that which was spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن باالفرد الخبیر و اقبل الی قلب العالم و اعترف بما نطق
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
